description: Style Note Want to steal the show? Want to break off from the mundane? Want to set a trend? Want to stand out from the crowd? Now here's your chance to make a slick style statement with this maxima Aqua watch - this is the time-piece you've been waiting for to pep-up your accessory collection! Product Details Case style: Black round plastic case with a silver bezel Dial style: Black dial with grey indicies and white hands Strap stype: Black synthetic strap with tang clasp Water resistant to 3ATM, suitable for light rain or splashes Warranty: 1 Year Size: Case diameter: 45 mm Case thickness: 5 mm
